# Dia Browser Release Notes

## April 2026

**April 16, 2026** (NEW)
- Latest release posted; specific features not detailed in the changelog summary (page only listed the release headline)

**v1.26.0** (April 9, 2026)
- **Sync Feature Launch**: Cross-device browser synchronization with end-to-end encryption and local-first architecture
  - Recovery kit creation for account backup
  - Connect multiple devices through 6-character codes
  - Syncs favorites/bookmarks and other browser data across devices
  - No central server arbitration — conflict resolution handled locally

**v1.25.0** (April 2, 2026)
- Downloads with Visual Guidance
- Custom Tab Icons with emojis
- Split-Screen Multitasking
- Meeting Countdown Animations
- Tab Group Naming Animation
- Spotify Integration Visual
- Navigation Button Feedback

## March 2026

**v1.24.0** (March 26, 2026)
- Fixed memory leaks
- Optimized new tab page animations
- Accelerated command bar suggestion rendering
- Improved system load handling
- Added Early Birds Program
- Built-in performance issue recording tool

**v1.23.0** (March 19, 2026)
- Review and merge workflow features

**v1.22.0** (March 11, 2026)
**v1.21.0** (March 5, 2026)

## Last Fetched
2026-04-23
